name: harness-local
description: Local marketplace for the self-improving NCode agent harness

plugins.name: harness-self-improvement
plugins.description: SIPS (Self Improvement Plugin System) home-base: SIPS-owned Memory Fabric recall, autonomy gate, continuity packets, outcome tracking, drift detection, self-correction loop, delegation agents, commands, and a portable MCP control plane. All agents inherit the session model; versatility comes from bounded fresh-context delegation and forced lesson capture, not model swaps.
